mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HEALTH_PLAN_EXERCISE_ITEMS ( ITEM_ID, PLAN_ID, EXERCISE_TYPE, DURATION_MINUTES, FREQUENCY, INTENSITY, CALORIES_BURNED, CAUTION, SORT_ORDER, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{planId}, #{exerciseType}, #{durationMinutes}, #{frequency}, #{intensity}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{caution}, #{sortOrder}, 0 )
